zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Henry Rogers於1523年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特普爾時，他的父親Richard Rogers38歲，母親Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell31歲。他於1540年與Thomasina Heydon結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1612年12月24日在英國英格蘭多瑟特普爾 聖 詹姆斯享年89歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特普爾 聖 詹姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Henry Rogers于1523年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特普爾时，他的父亲Richard Rogers38岁，母亲Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell31岁。他于1540年与Thomasina Heydon结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1612年12月24日在英国英格兰多瑟特普爾 聖 詹姆斯享年89岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特普爾 聖 詹姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Rogers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Roger , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: adopted for Gaelic Mac Ruaidhrí (see Rorie ).

History: Thomas Rogers (c. 1587–1621), born in London, England, was among the Pilgrim Fathers who sailed on the Mayflower in 1620. He died during the first winter at Plymouth Colony, but his son Joseph survived and married, and was later joined in MA by his brother John. This name was subsequently brought to North America independently by many different bearers.

variants.name: Roger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alcee, Armand, Laurent, Leonce, Marcel, Yves, Clovis, Fernand, Gilberte, Janvier, Jean Claude.

Scottish, English, North German, French, Walloon, Catalan, and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements hrōd ‘renown’ +gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, which was introduced into England by the Normans in the form Rog(i)er and was reinforced by the Old Norse cognate Hróthgeirr.

History: Gabriel Roger from Sainte-Verge in Deux-Sèvres, France, married Marie (de) Lacour in Quebec City, QC, in 1669. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Rodgers
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Rogers  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Henry Rogers was born in 1523, in Poole, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Rogers, was 38 and his mother, Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell, was 31. He married Thomasina Heydon in 1540. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 24 December 1612, in Poole St James, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89, and was buried in Poole St James, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Henry Rogers est né en 1523, à Poole, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Rogers, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Thomasina Heydon en 1540. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 24 décembre 1612, à Poole St James, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterré à Poole St James, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Henry Rogers 1523 in Poole, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Rogers 38 und seine Mutter Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell 31. Er hat 1540 Thomasina Heydon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Dezember 1612 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Poole St James, Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Poole St James, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Henry Rogers è nato il nel 1523 nel Poole, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Rogers, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Thomasina Heydon nel 1540. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 24 dicembre 1612, nel Poole St James, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolto a Poole St James, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Henry Rogersが1523年にイギリスイギリスドールセトポオルで生まれた時，父Richard Rogersは38歳，母Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncellは31歳であった。1540年にThomasina Heydonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1612年12月24日にイギリスイギリスドールセトポオル スト ジャムスで89歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトポオル スト ジャムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Henry Rogers(이)가 1523년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 포일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Rogers(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1540년 Thomasina Heydon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1612년 12월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 포일 스트 자메스에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 포일 스트 자메스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Henry Rogers nasceu em 1523, em Poole, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Rogers, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Thomasina Heydon em 1540. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1612, em Poole St James, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 89 anos, e foi sepultado em Poole St James, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Henry Rogers родился в 1523 г. в местности пул, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Rogers было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasina Heydon в 1540 г. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 24 декабря 1612 г. в местности пул ст джемесь, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет и был похоронен в местности пул ст джемесь, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
